name: Steering Robustness into World Action Models via Mechanistic Interpretability and Optimal Control

description: arXiv:2607.14943v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: World Action Models (WAMs) enable semantically- and physically-informed control but are brittle under distribution shift. In this work, we use mechanistic interpretability to study how robustness-relevant perturbations are represented in WAM activation space. Comparing activations across successful and unsuccessful rollouts, we find some WAM arc...
author: Jihoon Hong, Julian Skifstad, Qiyue Dai, Alice Chan, Glen Chou
